code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
mut count = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(input)
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      in_token = false
    else
      if not in_token
        count = count + 1
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    in_token = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = count % 3
match r
when 0
  println("Red")
when 1
  println("Green")
when _
  println("Yellow")
end
